title: US Conducts Fresh Round of Strikes in Iran After Second Ship Hit
summary: The US conducted a fresh round of strikes against multiple targets in Iran on Saturday, the military said.

title: Warsh Makes Debut on the Global Stage With the Class of 2008
summary: Kevin Warsh and three other veterans of the 2008 global financial crisis will share a stage this week as the danger of renewed turmoil continues to haunt central bankers.

title: Tech Equity Sales Renew AI Debt-Binge Worries
summary: Tech companies are selling stock like it’s the dot-com boom, and some investors fear that’s a bad sign for bondholders.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 6/27/2026
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Fmr. UN Ambassador and Fmr. USAID Administrator Samantha Power and Oklahoma Senator Alan Armstrong. (Source: Bloomberg)

Aid Groups Flock to Venezuela In Search-and-Rescue Frenzy
summary: Two of the US military ships used in a blockade meant to pressure Nicolás Maduro have headed back toward Venezuela, this time with rescue teams, equipment and medical aid after devastating twin earthquakes struck the country this week.
